score_injection_action: Rank Apprentice (0-20) with user_rating_1(-20) signals recent output quality failure; applied heightened evidence discipline — every claim verified against actual file contents and test run output before inclusion; refused to carry forward pre-compaction auth-flag regression assertion without re-running the generated tests to confirm failure mode independently

requirement.original: Security vulnerability in git commit privilege guard: changelog-analyst in BULK=false mode can use auto-bulk: prefix to bypass BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE guard (no sentinel check existed pre-M4). Fix: (1) guard must verify sentinel exists when BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE matches; (2) changelog-analyst agent definition must prohibit auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode. Orchestrator pre-note: commits 41063a1 and e443a98 may already implement the guard fix.
requirement.clarified: Guard fix (41063a1 + e443a98) is COMPLETE and passing 13 of 15 sentinel tests (2 fail due to stale /tmp grant files, not guard logic). Two remaining gaps: (1) write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py auth-flag gate was stripped in commit 9d68a38, causing test_AC_04_static and test_AC_05_phase_a_blocked_bulk_no_step7_marker to FAIL; (2) changelog-analyst.md DO NOT section (lines 26-42) has 12 rules but none prohibit auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode.
requirement.what: Restore auth-flag gate in write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py; add DO NOT rule 13 to changelog-analyst.md; fix test isolation for 2 sentinel tests affected by stale /tmp grant files
requirement.why: Without the auth-flag gate, any subagent can write a valid bulk-commit sentinel, defeating the guard's sentinel check. Without the DO NOT rule, changelog-analyst has no behavioral contract prohibiting auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode (only the dispatcher commit.md has it, not the agent definition itself).

included: Restore auth_flag_path check in write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py (CLAUDE_BULK_AUTH_FLAG_PATH_OVERRIDE + /tmp/claude-bulk-allowed-<sid>.flag, unlink-first contract)
Add DO NOT rule 13 to agents/changelog-analyst.md prohibiting auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode
Fix test isolation in test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py for test_blessed_bridge_with_sentinel_allowed and test_f_flag_blessed_bridge_allowed_with_sentinel (mock _has_active_commit_grant)
excluded: Changes to commit.md (BULK=false prohibition already at line 121)
New behavioral tests for changelog-analyst (agent behavioral compliance untestable via unit test)

success_criteria: test_AC_04_static PASSES (static assertions: auth_flag_path in script, BULK mode requires explicit user authorization in script, CLAUDE_BULK_AUTH_FLAG_PATH_OVERRIDE in script, unlink before write)
test_AC_05_phase_a_blocked_bulk_no_step7_marker PASSES (script exits non-zero when auth flag absent, sentinel not written)
All 15 hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py tests PASS (including the 2 currently failing due to stale grants)
changelog-analyst.md DO NOT section contains explicit rule prohibiting auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode
constraints: Auth-flag gate must use CLAUDE_BULK_AUTH_FLAG_PATH_OVERRIDE env var for test isolation (required by existing test assertions)
Unlink MUST occur BEFORE sentinel write (unlink-first contract, asserted by test_AC_04_static idx_unlink < idx_write)
DO NOT rule must be in the numbered list at lines 26-42, not elsewhere in the document
Guard logic (pretool-git-privilege-guard.py) must NOT be modified

out_of_scope_observations.observation: _has_active_commit_grant() does a global /tmp scan for claude-commit-grant-*.json and *.lck files. Stale grant files from crashed sessions are not cleaned up by stop-cleanup-allowlist.sh (only active session grants are reaped). This causes test_blessed_bridge_with_sentinel_allowed and test_f_flag_blessed_bridge_allowed_with_sentinel to fail when real /tmp has stale grants. The S1 fix (mock in tests) addresses the test symptom; the underlying stale-grant reaping gap is path-external and tracked here.

root_cause_analysis.symptom: changelog-analyst in another session used auto-bulk: prefix commit message in BULK=false mode, bypassing privilege guard and committing files from a different task context
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: Two independent defects: (1) write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py auth-flag gate was removed in commit 9d68a38 (auto-bulk commit), allowing any subagent to write a valid sentinel without human authorization — defeating the guard's sentinel check. (2) agents/changelog-analyst.md DO NOT section has no explicit prohibition against auto-bulk: prefix in BULK=false mode, leaving the agent's behavioral contract incomplete.
root_cause_analysis.root_cause_commit: 9d68a38 — auto-bulk commit that removed auth_flag_path gate from write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py (guard fix commits 41063a1 + e443a98 are correct and complete)
root_cause_analysis.why_introduced: The auth-flag gate was added in task 20260524-205206 (commit 420a16b) but was subsequently overwritten by a later auto-bulk commit (9d68a38) that replaced the entire script with a simplified version containing only the comment 'Authorization: /commit --bulk has disable-model-invocation: true, so reaching this script already proves human invocation. No separate auth flag is required'
root_cause_analysis.why_problematic: The comment's reasoning is incorrect: disable-model-invocation: true only blocks SlashCommand invocation; it does not prevent a subagent from calling the Python script directly via Bash. Without the auth-flag gate, any subagent can invoke write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py and create a valid sentinel, enabling auto-bulk: commits to bypass the guard's sentinel check.
root_cause_analysis.timeline: Auth-flag gate: added 420a16b → stripped 9d68a38. Guard sentinel check: absent pre-41063a1 → correct post-41063a1. Agent DO NOT rule: never added.
observations: write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py current HEAD (lines 68-88): no auth_flag_path variable, no os.path.exists check, no os.unlink call — directly writes sentinel after resolving SID (observed: Read tool on current file)
test_AC_04_static FAILS on current HEAD: assertion 'auth_flag_path' in script fails (observed: pytest run output, exit non-zero)
test_AC_05_phase_a_blocked_bulk_no_step7_marker FAILS: script exits 0 and writes sentinel when auth flag absent (observed: pytest run output showing 'assert 0 != 0')
changelog-analyst.md DO NOT section lines 26-42: 12 rules, none mention auto-bulk: or BULK=false (observed: Read tool)
commit 9d68a38 removed auth_flag_path gate (inferred from git log + current file state vs test expectations)
pretool-git-privilege-guard.py _evaluate_commit(): blocks BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE match when _has_bulk_commit_sentinel() returns False (observed: test_blessed_bridge_without_sentinel_blocked PASSES)
root_cause_analysis.localization_evidence: Ran pytest on test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py and generated tests; confirmed 2 sentinel tests fail due to stale /tmp grants (not auth-flag regression), and 2 generated tests fail due to missing auth_flag_path in write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py. Read the script directly to confirm no auth_flag_path code exists at HEAD.
root_cause_analysis.located_source: scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py (lines 68-88: auth_flag_path gate absent) and agents/changelog-analyst.md (lines 26-42: DO NOT rule 13 absent)

attempts.actual_change: Guard now blocks BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE commits without valid sentinel; defers when active commit grant present; _extract_commit_message() handles -F <tmpfile> form

novelty_check.rationale: Prior L3 attempt (420a16b) was correct but incomplete and was subsequently reverted by an auto-bulk commit. Prior L4 attempt (guard fix) is correct. This attempt restores L3 (sentinel writer gate) AND adds L1 (agent definition rule), addressing all three dimensions simultaneously. The combination has not been attempted before.

context.codebase_state: dot-claude repo on branch master; write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py missing auth-flag gate; 2 generated tests FAILING; 13 of 15 sentinel tests PASSING (2 fail due to stale /tmp grant files)
context.recent_commits: e443a98 feat(hooks): Fix E — auto-bulk deferral when commit grant active; 41063a1 fix(hooks): enforce bulk-commit sentinel for auto-bulk: BLESSED_BRIDGE_RE; 9d68a38 (auto-bulk, stripped auth_flag_path gate)

development_approach.strategy: Three-file patch: (1) restore auth_flag_path gate in write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py using prior implementation as reference (git show 420a16b:scripts/write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py); (2) append DO NOT rule 13 to agents/changelog-analyst.md; (3) add @patch.object mock for _has_active_commit_grant in 2 sentinel tests to fix isolation
development_approach.validation_approach: Run python3 -m pytest hooks/tests/test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py tests/generated/20260524-205206/test_AC_04_d4e6f8a0c3b5d7ea.py::test_AC_04_static tests/generated/20260524-205206/test_AC_05_e5f7a9b1c4d6e8fb.py::test_AC_05_phase_a_blocked_bulk_no_step7_marker -v and assert all pass

_risk_level_doc: Security-sensitive infrastructure: write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py is the gate that prevents subagents from self-authorizing bulk commits; any error in the auth-flag restoration could re-open the bypass vector

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex confirmed guard fix correctness and identified two additional findings: (1) the auth-flag regression in write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py causing 2 generated tests to FAIL; (2) the test isolation issue in test_bulk_commit_sentinel.py where stale /tmp grant files cause 2 tests to FAIL. Codex validated the changelog-analyst DO NOT section gap as a real security concern (documentation gap that could be exploited).

findings.issue: write-bulk-commit-sentinel.py auth-flag gate removed in commit 9d68a38, causing test_AC_04_static and test_AC_05_phase_a_blocked_bulk_no_step7_marker to FAIL
findings.proposed_fix: Restore auth_flag_path gate with CLAUDE_BULK_AUTH_FLAG_PATH_OVERRIDE env var support and unlink-first contract, using commit 420a16b as reference implementation
findings.rationale: Confirmed by running tests; 2 failures verified independently. Fix is Must Have M1.

findings.issue: test_blessed_bridge_with_sentinel_allowed and test_f_flag_blessed_bridge_allowed_with_sentinel fail when stale /tmp grant files present
findings.proposed_fix: Add @patch.object(guard, '_has_active_commit_grant', return_value=False) decorator to both tests to isolate from real /tmp state
findings.rationale: Confirmed by observing 'DEFERRED: auto-bulk commit skipped' in test stderr. Fix is Should Have S1.

findings.issue: changelog-analyst DO NOT section missing explicit auto-bulk: prohibition in BULK=false mode
findings.proposed_fix: Add rule 13: 'Never use auto-bulk: prefix when BULK=false — the BULK flag is passed in the dispatch prompt; check it before constructing commit messages. BULK=false commits MUST use <type>(<scope>): <summary> format only.'
findings.rationale: Prohibition exists in commit.md dispatcher (line 121) but not in the agent's own behavioral contract. Agent reads its own definition for rules; the dispatcher prohibition is insufficient for defense in depth. Fix is Must Have M2.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Auth-flag regression added as M1 (primary fix); test isolation fix added as S1; changelog-analyst DO NOT rule confirmed as M2. All three findings integrated into spec.
